lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. It shows significant wear on both the interior and exterior. There are multiple mechanical issues that require repair for the car to be fully functional.
This vehicle is in mint condition. There are no visible defects on the exterior or interior. All mechanical systems are fully operational and perform as new.

Check out this wonderful find! This car has been very well-cared for and is in great shape overall. It offers a smooth, reliable ride and has a clean interior that shows just a bit of normal character from its previous adventures. It’s a dependable vehicle that’s ready for many more miles on the road!

This vehicle is in mint, showroom condition and has been meticulously maintained since day one. The exterior is flawless, with the original paint retaining a deep, mirror-like finish and absolutely no scratches, chips, or dents. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, and every electronic feature operates exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is perfect, having always been stored in a climate-controlled garage and serviced exclusively at the dealership with a complete set of maintenance records included. With exceptionally low mileage, this is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that drives as beautifully as it looks.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant work to be fully roadworthy. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable dents, peeling clear coat, and visible rust along the rocker panels and wheel arches. Inside, the cabin has seen heavy use; the driver’s seat has a large tear, and there are persistent stains on the floor mats and headliner. Mechanically, the engine starts but has a persistent oil leak and a rough idle. The suspension is quite worn, resulting in a noisy ride, and the air conditioning is currently non-functional. This car is being sold as-is and would best suit someone looking for a parts car or a dedicated restoration project.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that rivals its original showroom debut. This specimen exhibits flawless paintwork, a pristine interior, and mechanical integrity that reflects a history of uncompromising care. For the discerning individual seeking a vehicle in peerless condition, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a benchmark of automotive excellence.

Hey everyone! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied it since day one, kept it garage-parked, and it’s been meticulously maintained. If you’re looking for something that looks and drives like it's brand new, this is the one for you. You really have to see it in person to believe how clean it is. Drop me a message if you want to come take a look!

Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3 in concours-ready condition. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering peak torque through six individual throttle bodies and a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis is impeccably preserved, with a reinforced rear subframe and a recently overhauled dual-VANOS system ensuring optimal variable valve timing. The suspension geometry remains true to factory specifications, utilizing aluminum control arms and M-tuned dampers for neutral handling. Finished in Carbon Black Metallic with unblemished Nappa leather, this vehicle retains its factory aerodynamic integrity and staggered Style 67 forged wheels. A mechanically flawless example for the discerning collector seeking peak atmospheric performance.
Mint condition car. Original paint. Zero scratches. Spotless interior. Low mileage. Runs perfectly. Clean title.

Offering a truly exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior paint is flawless, boasting a deep, glass-like finish with absolutely no swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the high-grade leather upholstery remains firm and supple without a single crease, and the carpets have been protected by heavy-duty mats since day one. All electronic systems, from the premium audio to the advanced navigation, operate with precision. Under the hood, the engine bay is pristine, reflecting a rigorous adherence to factory service schedules—all of which

This vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of its class, preserved in a state that can only be described as immaculate. Every aspect of this specimen, from its flawless exterior finish to the pristine, untouched interior, reflects a standard of care that is rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Engineered for the discerning driver who refuses to compromise on quality, this car offers a showroom-fresh experience. We invite serious inquiries for this exceptional acquisition.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen exhibits no discernible wear, reflecting a level of preservation that confirms its status as a premier, showroom-quality offering. Every component, from the immaculate exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, has been rigorously vetted to ensure mechanical and aesthetic perfection. This represents a singular opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle in peerless condition.

Hey there! 👋 You honestly have to see this beauty in person to believe it. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, kept tucked away in a garage and pampered since day one. It drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor—super smooth, sparkling clean, and without a single worry. If you’re looking for a ride that feels brand new but with a much friendlier price tag, this is definitely the one! Come take it for a spin and fall in love!

Presenting an investment-grade E46 M3 in concours-level condition. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering peak power through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. Mechanically optimized with a comprehensive VANOS overhaul, rod bearing replacement, and a reinforced rear subframe to address chassis fatigue common to the platform. The suspension geometry is sharpened by a Bilstein PSS10 coilover system, while stopping power is provided by a six-piston Brembo monoblock setup. This vehicle retains its factory-original Laguna Seca Blue finish with zero paint correction required, sitting on staggered Style 67 forged wheels. A peerless example of analog precision for the discerning collector.
2021 Luxury Sedan. Mint condition. One owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Dealer maintained. Showroom quality interior.

Presenting a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in true showroom condition. This single-owner masterpiece has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, preserving its flawless original paint and immaculate leather interior. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, while the cabin remains in 'as-new' condition, retaining that fresh factory scent. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, accompanied by a comprehensive service history and exceptionally low mileage. Every feature, from the premium surround-sound system to the advanced driver-assist technology, functions perfectly. This is not just a used car; it is a meticulously preserved specimen for the most discerning enthusiast who demands perfection.

We are pleased to present an automotive specimen of exceptional caliber, preserved to exacting showroom standards. This vehicle exhibits impeccable provenance and has been maintained with a commitment to absolute refinement. From the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, every detail reflects a standard of stewardship that is increasingly rare. For the discerning enthusiast who demands unrivaled aesthetic and mechanical integrity, this offering represents a premier acquisition opportunity.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle in absolute showroom condition. This specimen has been meticulously maintained to the highest standards, exhibiting no signs of wear or mechanical compromise. Every detail reflects a commitment to excellence, ensuring a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle in a truly pristine state.

Hey everyone! 👋 You’ve got to see this absolute beauty! This car is in truly mint condition—it honestly looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve taken such good care of it, and it's sparkling clean inside and out. If you're looking for perfection without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed! ✨

Available is a museum-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the iconic S54B32 3.2L inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. This example is paired with a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and a factory-calibrated M-variable differential lock. Precision-maintained, the high-pressure Double-VANOS system has been overhauled, and the rod bearings have undergone proactive replacement. The chassis is structurally sound with no subframe fatigue, retaining its original suspension geometry and factory dampening characteristics. Finished in pristine Titanium Silver over Nappa leather, this vehicle represents a pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance and mechanical purity.
Pristine condition. No scratches or interior wear. Garage kept. Full service history included. Mechanically perfect.

This vehicle is an absolute masterpiece, meticulously maintained to the highest standards and presented in showroom condition. Every inch of the deep, lustrous exterior paint remains flawless, free from any swirls, stone chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin retains its original factory scent, with the premium leather upholstery showing zero signs of wear, creasing, or fading. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach; it has been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships with a comprehensive, documented history to prove its pampered life. Always garage-kept under a breathable cover and never driven in inclement weather, this car represents a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. All original manuals, both master keys, and a pristine set of factory floor mats are included.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, preserved in a state that transcends the typical secondary market offering. Every surface reflects a commitment to aesthetic and mechanical perfection, offering the discerning collector or enthusiast an opportunity to acquire a machine of showroom quality. This is an investment-grade acquisition for those who accept nothing less than the superlative.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in showroom condition and representing the pinnacle of its class. This unit has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure every mechanical and aesthetic detail adheres to the highest standards of excellence. With its impeccable finish and flawless interior, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a truly pristine specimen. Offered with a focus on quality and long-term value.

Hey there! You've seriously got to see this beauty. It’s in absolute showroom condition—honestly, it still has that new car smell! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like a total dream. It’s basically flawless inside and out, with not a single scratch to be found. If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically brand new without the dealership headache, this is the one for you! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Offered is an investment-grade E39 M5, featuring the legendary S62 4.9L V8 with individual throttle bodies and Double-VANOS variable valve timing. This example remains mechanically peerless, showing consistent compression across all cylinders and a bone-dry undercarriage. The Getrag 420G six-speed manual gearbox offers crisp, notch-free engagement, paired with a factory-spec limited-slip differential for optimal power delivery. Suspension geometry is preserved via fresh Lemförder bushings and Bilstein B8 dampers. The exterior retains its factory depth and luster, free of typical E39 pixel failure or subframe fatigue. Truly a turn-key specimen for the discerning collector.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Mechanically perfect.

Presented in absolute showroom condition, this vehicle is a testament to meticulous ownership and remains in a state of preservation rarely seen on the market. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero swirls, scratches, or rock chips, having been protected by a multi-stage ceramic coating since day one. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather remains taut and supple, the carpets are unmarked, and the interior still retains its original scent. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, with a complete, documented service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. It has been strictly garage-kept, never driven in inclement weather, and the undercarriage is as clean as the bodywork. Every electronic feature and driver aid functions perfectly. This is a turn-key

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a showroom standard that defies its tenure. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine cabin environment, reflects a commitment to preservation of the highest order. This is a rare acquisition opportunity for the discerning driver who demands mechanical perfection and aesthetic purity. An investment-grade specimen that offers an uncompromising driving experience.
